items.title: House of the Dragon
items.overview: The Targaryen dynasty is at the absolute apex of its power, with more than 15 dragons under their yoke. Most empires crumble from such heights. items.title: Binnelanders
items.overview: A South African Afrikaans soap opera. It is set in and around the fictional private hospital, Binneland Kliniek, in Pretoria, and the storyline follows the trials, trauma and tribulations of the staff and patients of the hospital.

items.title: 7de Laan
items.overview: 7de Laan is an extraordinary microcosm where good and bad, evil and wholesome characters find themselves forming part of a wholesome community where no matter what – everyone counts and everyone cares…

items.title: C.I.D.
items.overview: A team of dedicated men and women in the Crime Investigation Department will risk everything to solve Mumbai's toughest, most complicated crimes.

items.title: Late Show with David Letterman
items.overview: David Letterman uses mature humor to appeal to his audience in this weeknight series, which gets its music from a house band led by Paul Shaffer. Among the show's most-famous segments are the Top Ten List and Stupid Pet Tricks, the latter of which subsequently led to an additional recurring segment

items.title: The Tonight Show Starring Johnny Carson
items.overview: The Tonight Show Starring Johnny Carson is a talk show hosted by Johnny Carson under The Tonight Show franchise from 1962 to 1992. It originally aired during late-night. For its first ten years, Carson's Tonight Show was based in New York City with occasional trips to Burbank, California; in May 197

items.title: Egoli: Place of Gold
items.overview: A South African television soap opera created by Franz Marx which revolves around the daily ups, downs, trials and tribulations of a handful of families in and around Johannesburg (which is often referred to as eGoli - the City of Gold)

items.title: Jeopardy!
items.overview: America's favorite quiz show where contestants are presented with general knowledge clues in the form of answers, and must phrase their responses in question form.

items.title: The Daily Show
items.overview: The World's Fakest News Team tackle the biggest stories in news, politics and pop culture.

items.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
items.overview: In the criminal justice system, sexually-based offenses are considered especially heinous. In New York City, the dedicated detectives who investigate these vicious felonies are members of an elite squad known as the Special Victims Unit. These are their stories.

items.title: Silo
items.overview: In a ruined and toxic future, thousands live in a giant silo deep underground. After its sheriff breaks a cardinal rule and residents die mysteriously, engineer Juliette starts to uncover shocking secrets and the truth about the silo.

items.title: FROM
items.overview: Unravel the mystery of a nightmarish town in middle America that traps all those who enter. items.title: The Late Show with Stephen Colbert
items.overview: Stephen Colbert brings his signature satire and comedy to The Late Show with Stephen Colbert, the #1 show in late night, where he talks with an eclectic mix of guests about what is new and relevant in the worlds of politics, entertainment, business, music, technology, and more. items.title: Rote Rosen
items.overview: Rote Rosen is a German telenovela produced by Studio Hamburg Serienwerft Lüneburg and broadcast by Das Erste since November 6, 2006. The show is a complex telenovela, who tells one love story every season about women in their forties.

items.title: Watch What Happens Live with Andy Cohen
items.overview: Bravo network executive Andy Cohen discusses pop culture topics with celebrities and reality show personalities.

items.title: Caressing My Hibernating Bear
items.overview: Nowa, a bear living in the forest, decides to take an abandoned puppy under his wing. He names it Airi and takes care of it with great care. items.title: Law & Order
items.overview: In cases ripped from the headlines, police investigate serious and often deadly crimes, weighing the evidence and questioning the suspects until someone is taken into custody. items.title: Ulice
items.overview:
Ulice is a Czech soap opera produced and broadcast by Nova. In the Czech language Ulice means street.

items.title: CentoVetrine
items.overview: The series tells the stories of some of the characters who work or are related to an imaginary shopping center Centovetrine, located in the center of Turin. There are many stories of love and passion, but also struggles for power and dynastic quarrels in the telefilm.

items.title: Secret Mission - Undercover Agents Never Back Down!
items.overview: Narcotics Enforcement Agent Riko Ikazuchi is undercover with her junior colleague Noma in an apartment that serves as the hideout for a criminal organization. items.title: Mushoku Tensei: Jobless Reincarnation
items.overview: When a 34-year-old underachiever gets run over by a truck, his story doesn't end there. Reincarnated in a new world as an infant, Rudy will seize every opportunity to live the life he's always wanted. items.title: Late Night with Seth Meyers
items.overview: Seth Meyers, who is "Saturday Night Live's" longest serving anchor on the show's wildly popular "Weekend Update," takes over as host of NBC's "Late Night" — home to A-list celebrity guests, memorable comedy and the best in musical talent. items.title: Young Hearts
items.overview: Malhação is a Brazilian television series for the teenage audience. The soap started in 1995, and was set in a fictional Gym Club called Malhação on Barra da Tijuca, Rio de Janeiro. items.title: Gute Zeiten, schlechte Zeiten
items.overview: Gute Zeiten, schlechte Zeiten is a long-running German television soap opera, first broadcast on RTL in 1992. items.title: L'Invité
items.overview: The show features an interview with a famous personality from the world of politics, economics or culture.

items.title: Rick and Morty
items.overview: Follows a sociopathic genius scientist who drags his inherently timid grandson on adventures across the universe.

items.title: The Mentalist
items.overview: Patrick Jane, a former celebrity psychic medium, uses his razor sharp skills of observation and expertise at "reading" people to solve serious crimes with the California Bureau of Investigation.

items.title: Family Affairs
items.overview: Focuses on the lives of residents in the fictional London suburb of Charnham.

items.title: Family Guy
items.overview: Sick, twisted, politically incorrect and Freakin' Sweet animated series featuring the adventures of the dysfunctional Griffin family. items.title: The Rookie
items.overview: Starting over isn't easy, especially for small-town guy John Nolan who, after a life-altering incident, is pursuing his dream of being an LAPD officer. As the force's oldest rookie, he's met with skepticism from some higher-ups who see him as just a walking midlife crisis.

items.title: Meet the Press
items.overview: Meet the Press is a weekly American television news/interview program airing on NBC. It is the longest-running television series in American broadcasting history, despite bearing little resemblance to the original format of the program seen in its television debut on November 6, 1947. items.title: NCIS
items.overview: From murder and espionage to terrorism and stolen submarines, a team of special agents investigates any crime that has any connection to Navy and Marine Corps personnel, regardless of rank or position.

items.title: Striscia la Notizia
items.overview: Striscia la notizia is an Italian television program on the Mediaset-controlled Canale 5. Its name in Italian translates as "the news slithers", a probable parody of the slighting Italian journalist, submitted to politicians and overwhelmed with shame. items.title: Overflow
items.overview: Kazushi Sudou is a university student who is visited by his two childhood friends, the sisters Ayane and Kotone Shirakawa. items.title: The Prosecutor's Proposal
items.overview: A victim’s son and a killer’s son reunite as a prosecutor and investigator, fighting systemic corruption while becoming each other's salvation.

items.title: The Simpsons
items.overview: Set in Springfield, the average American town, the show focuses on the antics and everyday adventures of the Simpson family; Homer, Marge, Bart, Lisa and Maggie, as well as a virtual cast of thousands.
